text_original: If you looking for fun stories to get immersed in this is your stop. Not any nude images so go elsewhere for that.
text_zh: 如果你想寻找能让自己沉浸其中的有趣故事，来这里就对了。这里没有任何裸露图片，想看那些请去别处。
reply_original: Thank you for the review! We are thrilled you love our immersive stories. You are absolutely right—we focus on deep emotional connections and engaging narratives while complying with platform safety guidelines, so we do not offer explicit content. If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to email us at support@fantachat.ai!
reply_zh: 感谢您的评价！我们很高兴您喜欢我们的沉浸式故事。您说得完全正确——我们在遵守平台安全准则的同时，专注于深层的情感连接和引人入胜的叙事，因此我们不提供露骨内容。如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们！
